commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the embedded attempt session-lock controller so post-prompt reacquire verifies the fence without taking a retained write lock, factors fence capture into a helper, and updates two lock-lifecycle test expectations.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests 0. Total 0 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: Source-reproducible, not live reproduced here: current main reacquires a retained session write lock after prompt streaming, and the linked issue provides concrete queued Discord follow-up steps plus production SessionWriteLockTimeoutError logs. This review did not run the live Discord/gateway follow-up scenario.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs a contributor or maintainer revision for the session-fence blocker plus external real-behavior proof; automation cannot provide the contributor's queued gateway/channel proof.
